This '''medical unit''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] manufactured by [[Ubrikkian Steamworks]] some years prior to the introduction of the company's [[DD-13 medical assistant droid/Legends|DD-13 cybernetic surgical droid]].

Several of these medical units were supplied by Ubrikkian to assist with the reconstruction of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] following his [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] crash on [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]]. Following the success of Grievous's rehabilitation, Ubrikkian Steamworks fielded their new DD-13 unit in the [[Emperor Palpatine Surgical Reconstruction Center]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where it aided with the recovery of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].
